zh.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾宏比 卡素
zh.Richmond, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Conyers於1442年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾宏比時，她的父親Sir Christopher Conyers59歲，母親Ellyn Rolleston45歲。她於大約1464年與Robert Wycliffe在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年5月10日在英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿享年82歲。

zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.Richmond, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾里士滿
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Conyers于1442年出生在英国英格兰越可爾宏比时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Conyers59岁，母亲Ellyn Rolleston45岁。她于大约1464年与Robert Wycliffe在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1524年5月10日在英国英格兰越可爾里士滿享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Conyers was born in 1442, in Hornby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Christopher Conyers, was 59 and her mother, Ellyn Rolleston, was 45. She married Robert Wycliffe about 1464, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 May 1524, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Conyers est née en 1442, à Hornby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Christopher Conyers, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Ellyn Rolleston, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Wycliffe environ 1464, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1524, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Conyers 1442 in Hornby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Conyers 59 und ihre Mutter Ellyn Rolleston 45. Sie hat um 1464 in Yorkshire, England Robert Wycliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1524 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Conyers è nata il nel 1442 nel Hornby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Christopher Conyers, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Ellyn Rolleston, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Robert Wycliffe circa 1464, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 maggio 1524, nel Richmond, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Conyersが1442年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビーで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Conyersは59歳，母Ellyn Rollestonは45歳であった。約1464年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert Wycliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年5月10日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Conyers(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 호른비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Conyers(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellyn Rolleston(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1464년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert Wycliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Richmond, Yorkshire, England: Richmond, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Conyers nasceu em 1442, em Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Christopher Conyers, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Ellyn Rolleston, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Wycliffe aproximadamente 1464, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1524, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Conyers родилась в 1442 г. в местности хаурнби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Conyers было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellyn Rolleston, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wycliffe около 1464 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 мая 1524 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Conyers nació en 1442, en Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Christopher Conyers, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Ellyn Rolleston, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Robert Wycliffe aproximadamente 1464, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1524, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
